commit.message:
Fix game hang by correcting CPU branch timing

Branch taken (+1) and page-crossing (+2) cycle penalties were lost because
branch() incremented this.cycles but execute() overwrote it with the base
cost. Use a branchPenalty field that gets added after execute() returns.
Also remove temporary debug instrumentation from PPU and NesEmulator.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- The program doesn't use any network functionality

commit.message:
Add component diagram in draw.io format

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix game hang after screensaver by delivering APU frame counter IRQs to CPU

The APU's isIrqPending() was never checked in the main loop, so games
relying on APU IRQs for timing (e.g. Double Dragon & Battletoads) would
spin indefinitely waiting for an interrupt that never fired.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add APU implementation for sound support

Implement NES Audio Processing Unit with pulse, triangle, and noise
channels, wired into the CPU bus and main emulation loop. Audio output
uses javax.sound.sampled at 44100 Hz.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix game freeze after title screen by adding NMI edge detection, PRG RAM, and DMA NMI handling

- Trigger NMI immediately when game enables NMI via PPUCTRL while VBlank is active
- Add 8KB PRG RAM at $6000-$7FFF so game state reads/writes work correctly
- Check for NMI during DMA transfer to avoid missing VBlank interrupts

Improve keybindings, scroll tracking, and hidden file defaults

- 'a' key toggles select all / deselect all
- Alt+k / Alt+j for jump to top / bottom (j/k exclude alt modifier)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add auto tests, NAR condition backtest, lap time scraper, oikiri training

1. Auto tests (tests/test_features.py): 5-point verification covering
   model auto-switch, condition classification A-E, odds investment
   allocation 400/300, track record CRUD, system checks

2. Fix condition classification bug: '不良' was matching '良' as good
   track - now uses heavy_track priority check

3. NAR backtest with condition-based analysis (A-E): all conditions
   ROI < 80% → NAR set to non-recommended (best was condition B at 68%)

4. Lap time scraper (fetch_lap_times, fetch_horse_lap_history): scrapes
   race lap data from db.netkeiba.com for pace prediction improvement

5. Oikiri training integration in train_v9.py: CSV col 51 (4F training
   time) added as feature. v9.1 AUC 0.8456 vs v9 AUC 0.8215 (+0.024)
   - training_time_filled: 2nd most important feature (132K gain)
   - training_per_dist: 3rd most important (64K gain)

commit.message:
Fix Gate over-asking and UNCLEAR negation detection

- Category goals: 'Must secure' → 'Aim to gather' to stop them from overriding Gate
- Gate instruction: explicitly state only ① name + ② figure determine deep_dive
- UNCLEAR: split into VAGUE vs NEGATION-OF-TOPIC; NOT UNCLEAR now only covers assertions
  Fixes '힘들었던 적이 없어요' being classified as GENUINE (it's a negation)

  decay (~0.75 s)
- Dice faces cycle rapidly through random values for 800 ms while rolling,
  giving a visual tumbling effect (die-rolling shake animation)

- Roll button is disabled during the animation to prevent double-rolls

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

[#2242] Fix chat agent namespace mismatch in DB fallback (#2259)

The GET /chat/agents endpoint used getStoreNamespace() (single write
namespace) instead of getEffectiveNamespaces() (read namespace array).
When the gateway WS is disconnected and agents were synced under a
different namespace, the DB fallback query returned empty results.

- Switch GET /chat/agents to use getEffectiveNamespaces (read path)
- Update AgentCache.getAgents() to accept string[] for multi-namespace
- Update _getFromDb() to use WHERE namespace = ANY($1::text[])
- Add tests for multi-namespace DB fallback queries

Closes #2242

Co-authored-by: security-agent-1 <security-agent-1@devcontainer-security.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add two-phase adaptive optimization with SSE progress and live chart

Replace exhaustive grid search with smart two-phase strategies:
- Monte Carlo → Refine: LHS samples the space, then fine-grids the best region
- Coarse → Fine: wide-step grid followed by narrow-step refinement
- Full Grid still available for small searches

Real-time progress via Server-Sent Events with live "best so far" Chart.js
plot that updates on every iteration. Phase 1→2 transition shown as color
change (blue→green). Abort button kills running optimization mid-search.

Rate limit campaign sends to 30 messages per minute

feat: v0.5.0 milestone release — full UI/UX + security audit

## Frontend
- Fix DmLayout outlet wrapper missing flex styles (v0.4.4 regression)
- Add toast feedback on reaction toggle, poll vote, and pin/unpin failures
- Add loading/disabled state on category edit save button
- Add ARIA attributes (role=listbox/option, aria-selected) to mention/emoji autocomplete
- Fix emoji reaction picker position on small viewports
- Extract MAX_FILE_SIZE constant to avoid duplication
- Restore Link components for channel navigation (ChannelList)
- Improve DmList mobile sidebar toggle

## Security
- Add MIME type whitelist on file uploads (blocks text/html, application/javascript)
- Add WebSocket message size limit (64KB max, prevents memory exhaustion)
- Add webhook rate limiting (5 req/sec per webhook)
- Fix admin reset-password endpoint leaking config info (now returns 401)
- Add X-Content-Type-Options and X-Frame-Options security headers to all nginx locations
- Add CORS headers to /health endpoint (fixes Tauri native app connection)

## Infrastructure
- Add Android Tauri build support (AndroidManifest, schemas)
- Update landing page

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(observability): improve trace visibility with request paths and full SQL (#470)

Gateway spans showed just "GET" with no path, and db.statement showed
"invalid string type in <nil>" instead of actual SQL. This makes traces
very hard to interpret in Jaeger.

Changes:
- Add http.url.path and http.url.query as span attributes in both
  gateway and worker filters so actual request paths are visible
- Update gateway span name to include the path (e.g., "GET /api/users")
- Disable DB statement sanitizer (configmap) to show full SQL
- Add HTTP header capture for tenant/user headers as span tags
- Set span attribute value length limit to 4096 to prevent truncation

Co-authored-by: Craig Klinker <craigklinker@velocityglobal.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat(arena): project detail reorg, gym enhancements, references (#94)

* fix: auto-symlink .env.local in git worktrees on session start

Worktrees don't get untracked files from the main repo. The session-init
hook now detects worktree context via git-common-dir and symlinks .env.local
from the main working tree before any other env logic runs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(arena): deep rewrite of base skills, cleanup legacy data, expand to 10 dimensions

Rewrite all 5 existing base skill dimensions (color, typography, spacing,
elevation, radius) with substantive creative direction — each decision now
carries genuine design knowledge about when to use a token, why it exists,
and how it interacts with other decisions.

Add 5 new qualitative dimensions: density, motion, iconography, voice, and
presentation. Token-bearing dimensions (density, motion, iconography) get
theme tokens; pure-policy dimensions (voice, presentation) have no theme
layer — the skill IS the complete direction.

Cleanup: migration deletes 12 orphaned backchannel template skills and
their themes, removes 3 mislinked default theme rows, seeds missing base
color theme. Project creation form updated to show all 10 dimensions
(core 5 checked by default), removed substrate/figma/scope fields.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(arena): add Fonts and Icons as top-level sections

Fonts page shows live @font-face previews of custom fonts at multiple
sizes/weights, plus system font specimens. Icons page provides searchable
Lucide and Phosphor grids with tab switching and click-to-copy. Both are
now first-class nav items alongside Projects, Skills, Themes, Components.

Also adds icon_library selector to project inputs and displays it on the
project detail page.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(arena): add 'use client' to icons page for next/dynamic ssr:false

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(arena): fix build for Phosphor icons package

Add @phosphor-icons/react to serverExternalPackages to prevent webpack
from bundling the large barrel export during static generation. Use
force-dynamic for fonts and icons pages, and lazy-load both icon
libraries via dynamic imports.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(arena): inline inputs on project detail page, reorder sections

Move inputs from a separate sub-page to an inline auto-saving panel.
Reorder sections to: Header → Inputs → Assembly → Foundation → Sessions → Skills.
Remove confusing "Import from Figma" and "Edit Inputs" header buttons.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(arena): add image upload to project inputs, arena-images storage

Replace text-based image URL input with proper file upload to Supabase
arena-images bucket. Add RLS policies and set bucket public for display.
Add error handling to all inline input saves.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(arena): clone templates on project creation, rewrite foundation generation

Template cloning: createProjectAction now clones base template skills for
each configured dimension and theme template tokens on project creation,
so projects start with skills in assembly and theme values ready.

Foundation rewrite: multimodal action that analyzes project images, fonts,
and description alongside current template skills/tokens. Outputs updated
skill decisions with project-aligned rationale and token values extracted
from inputs. Results are written back to project assembly skills and theme
rows. Model upgraded from haiku to sonnet for vision support.

Removes substrate concept from code (DB column retained harmlessly).
Updates FoundationBrief type: replaces intent[] with summary string.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(arena): relax foundation output schema for AI response flexibility

The strict Zod enums and required fields caused validation failures when
the AI returned slightly different structures (extra fields like value,
different confidence/severity strings). Use .passthrough() and optional
defaults so valid-shaped responses aren't rejected.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(arena): use permissive z.any() for foundation output skills/tokens

Nested Zod validation still too strict — AI returns decisions with
varying field presence across dimensions. Use z.any() for the skills
and tokens output records since real validation happens when writing
to DB in generateFoundation().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: update submodule references and refactor project detail page

- Updated submodule references for staged-spinning-valiant and vectorized-sprouting-robin.
- Refactored ProjectDetailPage to integrate AssemblySection, enhancing the handling of project assembly and parent skills.
- Removed unused dimension labels and colors, streamlining the codebase.
- Deleted obsolete SQL migration files for context packs and studies.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(arena): separate skill and theme cloning, rewrite assembly panel

Decouple skills from themes during project creation:
- cloneTemplateToProject() now clones skills only (no theme rows)
- createProjectAction() always clones themes independently from template
- Add updateBaseTemplates() to sync DB templates from BASE_SKILL/BASE_THEME_TOKENS

Rewrite assembly panel with strict skill/theme separation:
- Skills and Theme tabs show each layer independently
- Raw monospace text rendering instead of blended card UI
- Split-screen column comparison (Current/Initial) works for both layers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(arena): live theme updates, font loading, and gym UI improvements

Track theme state client-side so refinement token corrections reflect
in the canonical preview. Load custom arena fonts via @font-face
injection. Move refine button to gym header and rename to "Refine
(Round X)".

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: update submodule references and enhance AI action configuration

- Updated submodule references for staged-spinning-valiant and vectorized-sprouting-robin.
- Added maxOutputTokens configuration to the arena-generate-foundation action, allowing for increased output flexibility.
- Modified executeAction to utilize maxOutputTokens from the action definition, improving token management.
- Enhanced logging in generateFoundation for better traceability during AI action execution.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(arena): scope refine prompt to target dimension, fix output schema

When targetDimension is set, only send and request that dimension
instead of all three — prevents JSON truncation from token limits.
Replace strict .catchall() with permissive z.any() + transform to
handle unexpected keys from post-processing. Bump maxOutputTokens
to 8000 and add brevity instruction for intent fields.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(arena): cascading token changes, theme-aware review, contrast-safe buttons

Pass current theme tokens to the refine AI so it can reason about
contrast and coherence. Add cascade instruction telling the model to
update related tokens when a value changes. Merge refined dims into
full skill for review preview. Build merged theme with theme_updates
for refined canonical component. Add contrastText() utility for
buttons — auto-selects black/white text based on background luminance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(arena): add gym references — Figma links & image uploads as "like this" inputs

References let users provide proactive directional input alongside feedback
and annotations. Users can paste Figma URLs (fetched as screenshots via new
server-side API) or upload/paste images, annotate each with free-text, and
these get sent to the AI as multimodal context when refining skills.

- Add ArenaReference type and GymRoundData.references field
- Add References tab to skill gym with inline editor UI
- New /api/arena/figma-screenshot route (fetches node name + rendered PNG)
- Convert arena-refine-skill action to multimodal (buildMessages)
- Persist references in arena_session_references table per round
- Migration: 20260305100000_arena_session_references.sql
- Install react-knob-headless (missing dep from sampler merge)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: extrator inteligente de gastos — independente de ordem

Substitui 3 patterns regex rígidos por um extrator por componentes:
1. Acha VALOR (qualquer número no texto)
2. Detecta INTENÇÃO (verbos de gasto + merchants conhecidos)
3. Acha CARTÃO (compara com cartões reais do usuário no DB)
4. Extrai MERCHANT (o que sobra após remover valor/cartão/ruído)
5. Auto-categoriza

Funciona com qualquer estrutura de frase:
- "gastei 50 no ifood pelo nubank"
- "abasteci 32 de gasolina no posto shell no cartão mercado pago"
- "pagamento gasolina 130 mercado pago"
- "uber 15"
- "gasolina 32 mercado pago"

Proteções contra falso positivo:
- Sem verbo + sem merchant conhecido + sem cartão → cai no LLM
- Valor fora de faixa (0-999999) → ignora
- Sem número na mensagem → ignora
